name: Can I claim against chemical maker not my employer for work exposure?
description: Yes, sue makers for defects after comp filing[2].

mainEntity.name: Can I claim against chemical maker not my employer for work exposure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue makers for defects after comp filing[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, third-party lawsuits against manufacturers for faulty warnings/products alongside comp.** Prove their negligence caused harm[2]. **Key factors:** Specific product ID, safety sheets showing failures[2]. **Practical guidance:** Attorney coordinates comp and suit; clock starts on comp filing. Preserve evidence. **Dual claims possible.**
